entries.note: V59-A reuses the shipped V58 live-turn bind and reintegration surfaces by default.
V59-A adds one typed continuity admission gate over carried-forward workspace state without replacing V58 live admission.
Prior workspace state remains context at most and does not become standing authority or ambient admissibility.
V59-A admits create_new only when the selected target is explicitly classified as unoccupied.
Non-target occupants inside the declared continuity root remain contextual only and do not mint target entitlement.
Positive continuity reintegration requires declared current-turn witness plus witness basis or certificate reference.
